title: artemisia dracunculus subsp. typica
intro: Artemisia dracunculus subsp. typica, also known as wild tarragon or Russian tarragon, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family that is native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, relieve pain, and reduce fever. The health benefits of Artemisia dracunculus subsp. typica include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
